word: H2073 - זְבוּל - zᵉbûwl - ze-bool' - Dwell in

sections.paragraph:
Original: זבל זבוּל

Transliteration: zebûl zebûl

Phonetic: ze-bool'

BDB Definition:

  1. exalted, residence, elevation, lofty abode, height, habitation

Origin: from H2082

TWOT entry: 526a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
